endpoints.name: GET /providers/Microsoft.ManagedServices/operations
endpoints.description: Gets a list of the operations.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /{scope}/providers/Microsoft.ManagedServices/registrationAssignments
endpoints.description: Gets a list of the registration assignments.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SCOPE}} with a real scope.

endpoints.name: GET /{scope}/providers/Microsoft.ManagedServices/registrationAssignments/{registrationAssignmentId}
endpoints.description: Gets the details of specified registration assignment.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{REGISTRATIONASSIGNMENTID}} with a real registrationassignmentid. Replace {{SCOPE}} with a real scope.

endpoints.name: PUT /{scope}/providers/Microsoft.ManagedServices/registrationAssignments/{registrationAssignmentId}
endpoints.description: Creates or updates a registration assignment.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{REGISTRATIONASSIGNMENTID}} with a real registrationassignmentid. Replace {{SCOPE}} with a real scope.

endpoints.name: DELETE /{scope}/providers/Microsoft.ManagedServices/registrationAssignments/{registrationAssignmentId}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{REGISTRATIONASSIGNMENTID}} with a real registrationassignmentid. Replace {{SCOPE}} with a real scope.

endpoints.name: GET /{scope}/providers/Microsoft.ManagedServices/registrationDefinitions
endpoints.description: Gets a list of the registration definitions.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SCOPE}} with a real scope.

endpoints.name: GET /{scope}/providers/Microsoft.ManagedServices/registrationDefinitions/{registrationDefinitionId}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{REGISTRATIONDEFINITIONID}} with a real registrationdefinitionid. Replace {{SCOPE}} with a real scope.

endpoints.name: PUT /{scope}/providers/Microsoft.ManagedServices/registrationDefinitions/{registrationDefinitionId}
endpoints.description: Creates or updates a registration definition.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{REGISTRATIONDEFINITIONID}} with a real registrationdefinitionid. Replace {{SCOPE}} with a real scope.

endpoints.name: DELETE /{scope}/providers/Microsoft.ManagedServices/registrationDefinitions/{registrationDefinitionId}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{REGISTRATIONDEFINITIONID}} with a real registrationdefinitionid. Replace {{SCOPE}} with a real scope.
